title: The Express server's startup order
objective: Understand why server.ts mounts things in a specific order, and what broke before it did.

body.p: The route files existed but were never passed to app.use(...) — so /api/users and /api/logs returned 404 no matter what.
Express checks middleware in registration order. An error-handling middleware (4 parameters) only catches errors from routes registered before it.

quiz.q: What would happen if errorHandler were registered before the routes?
options: It would never catch errors from those routes, since it only sees requests that reach it in order
The server would crash on startup
